page_name: Yoga Course Details — Online 300 Hour Yoga Teacher Training — RYT 300

global_principles.tone: Subtle, premium, restrained — yoga-brand calm. Prefer 300–500ms ease-out fades and 8–16px translates. No spring bounces.
global_principles.reduced_motion: All framer-motion entrances must wrap in useReducedMotion()/MotionConfig — when prefers-reduced-motion is set, replace motion variants with instant opacity:1 and disable stagger. Tailwind hover/press transitions should also degrade via motion-reduce: utilities.
global_principles.viewport_strategy: Use whileInView with { once: true, amount: 0.2 } for scroll reveals — fire once when 20% of the element enters the viewport.

tailwind_primitives.hover-lift: transition-transform duration-300 ease-out hover:-translate-y-1 motion-reduce:transition-none motion-reduce:hover:translate-y-0
tailwind_primitives.hover-lift-shadow: transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg motion-reduce:transition-none motion-reduce:hover:translate-y-0 motion-reduce:hover:shadow-none
tailwind_primitives.hover-underline: relative after:absolute after:left-0 after:-bottom-0.5 after:h-px after:w-0 after:bg-current after:transition-[width] after:duration-300 hover:after:w-full motion-reduce:after:transition-none
tailwind_primitives.cta-glow: transition-all duration-300 ease-out hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md active:scale-[0.98] motion-reduce:transition-none motion-reduce:hover:translate-y-0 motion-reduce:hover:shadow-none motion-reduce:active:scale-100
tailwind_primitives.arrow-nudge: transition-transform duration-200 ease-out hover:translate-x-0.5 motion-reduce:transition-none motion-reduce:hover:translate-x-0
tailwind_primitives.tab-active-underline: relative transition-colors duration-200 after:absolute after:left-0 after:-bottom-1 after:h-0.5 after:w-full after:scale-x-0 after:origin-center after:bg-text-brand after:transition-transform after:duration-300 data-[active=true]:after:scale-x-100 motion-reduce:transition-none motion-reduce:after:transition-none

components.notes: Existing primitive — do not redesign. Reuses built-in nav interactions (sticky behaviour, mobile menu toggle) already in apps/web/src/components/nav.

actions.rationale: CTA label 'Reserve Your Spot Now' with href '#reserve' — smooth-scroll to reservation section/anchor. If a Reserve section doesn't exist on this page, open a modal.
'Check availability' next to 'Available in 4 Centers' — best guess to centers/availability page.

components.notes: Above-fold mount entrance. Image fades in cleanly; right column staggers up. CTA uses tailwind cta-glow (subtle lift + shadow + active press).

motion.details: Use Framer Motion layoutId='sectionTab-active' on the active-state pill background so it slides between tabs with a 300ms ease.

actions.rationale: Figma label is typo 'Circulum'; scroll target is the curriculum section.
'Overall' tab destination unclear — best guess: jump to the bottom summary/closing-cta. Flagged as unresolved.

sticky_behavior.trigger: Becomes sticky to top:0 once user scrolls past the hero (y > hero.bottom). Use position: sticky with top-[--header-height] OR an IntersectionObserver sentinel.
sticky_behavior.active_on_scroll: Use IntersectionObserver on each anchor section (#overview, #highlights, #curriculum, #pre-requisites, #closing-cta). Set active tab to the section whose top is closest to (viewport_top + 120px). Smooth-scroll on click with scroll-margin-top equal to sticky tabs height.
sticky_behavior.smooth_scroll: scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }), or use scroll-margin-top utility so headers align below sticky tabs.

components.notes: Sticky in-page tabs. Active state slides via framer-motion shared layout. Smooth-scroll on click; active tab driven by scrollspy.
Paragraphs fade up in sequence as the section enters viewport.

actions.rationale: Cards are informational, not links. Hover-lift is purely affordance polish.

components.notes: 6 cards in 3x2 grid; reveal staggered 80ms between cards.

actions.rationale: Advance the horizontal scroller by one card. Use ref.scrollBy({ left: cardWidth + gap, behavior: 'smooth' }). Hide/disable when at scrollEnd.
Figma shows only a right arrow; add left arrow for parity, hidden when at scrollStart.

carousel_behavior.snap: snap-x snap-mandatory on container, snap-start on each card
carousel_behavior.drag: Native overflow-x-auto + scroll-smooth; no JS drag needed
carousel_behavior.arrow_state: Right arrow disabled when scrollLeft + clientWidth >= scrollWidth - 1; left arrow disabled when scrollLeft <= 0. Use a useState hook updated on scroll event.
carousel_behavior.keyboard: ArrowLeft/ArrowRight when focus inside the row scrolls by one card.

components.notes: Right arrow shown in Figma; add left arrow programmatically for parity. Cards snap horizontally.
Two-col reveal: left content slides in from left, image from right — emphasises the two-column composition.
Dark band scales in subtly (0.97→1) to feel like a sealed certification stamp arriving.

actions.rationale: Cards are static quotes; no navigation. Hover-lift only.

components.notes: Stagger across cards uses slow 120ms — gives the masonry layout a graceful unveiling.
Centered checklist; reuses CheckList primitive — same stagger pattern as Is-This-For-You.

actions.rationale: Cards likely link to instructor bio pages. No Figma prototype data — guessing href pattern. Flagged unresolved.

components.notes: Row of 4 cards. Avatar image scales subtly inside its mask on hover.

motion.details: Uses data-[state=open]:rotate-180 — matches shadcn Accordion pattern. If icon is +/- rather than chevron, instead crossfade between Plus and Minus via AnimatePresence.

actions.rationale: Single-open accordion. First item open by default per Figma. If using shadcn Accordion type='single' collapsible, this is wired automatically.

components.notes: Reuse existing Accordion primitive if present in apps/web/src/components/ui. Expand uses height:auto via framer-motion (since CSS can't transition height:auto natively without grid trick). Apply MotionConfig reducedMotion='user' to disable expand animation when prefers-reduced-motion set.

motion.details: Arrow icon nudges right 2px on card hover. Apply group on card so the arrow can use group-hover:translate-x-0.5.

actions.rationale: Entire card is clickable. Slug derived from course title. No Figma prototype — flagged unresolved.
Mirrors card click target so nested anchor doesn't double-trigger.

components.notes: 3-up grid. Whole card clickable; image scales inside mask; arrow nudges. Stagger 80ms.

actions.rationale: Existing component. Per project rules do not redesign — only pass content. Action wired by parent.

components.notes: Reuse existing ClosingCtaSection. No additional motion — that component owns its own motion if any.
Existing primitive — do not redesign. Hover/link interactions are owned by the SiteFooter component.

reserve_cta_flow.trigger: Click on 'Reserve Your Spot Now' button in CourseHero, or 'View Program' on course cards
reserve_cta_flow.primary_path: Smooth-scroll to in-page anchor #reserve if a reservation form section exists on this page.
reserve_cta_flow.fallback_path: If no reservation section is present on this page, open a Reserve modal (dialog) with fields: name, email, phone, preferred-center, start-date. Body-scroll-lock while open; ESC to close; focus-trap inside dialog. Submit POSTs to /api/reserve and shows a confirmation state.
reserve_cta_flow.interaction_state: useState 'reserveOpen' lifted to page-level container. CTA onClick sets reserveOpen=true.
reserve_cta_flow.motion: Modal: backdrop fade-in 200ms, panel scale-in (0.97→1) + fade 300ms. Honor reduced-motion.
reserve_cta_flow.rationale: Figma shows the button with href='#reserve' but does not show a reservation section. Recommend confirming with product whether to scroll-to-anchor or open modal.

sticky_tabs_offset.concern: When tabs are sticky at top, any scroll-to-anchor target must add scroll-margin-top equal to tabs-height + site-header-height so the section title isn't hidden behind the sticky bar.
sticky_tabs_offset.implementation: Each anchor section: className='scroll-mt-32' (or computed via CSS variable --sticky-offset).

scrollspy.concern: Section tabs need active state tied to viewport position.
scrollspy.implementation: useEffect with IntersectionObserver on each [id] section, rootMargin: '-30% 0px -60% 0px', threshold: 0. Track currently-intersecting section; set active tab to its id. Disable scrollspy briefly (~600ms) after a manual click to avoid flicker while the smooth-scroll animation is in flight.

prefers_reduced_motion.concern: Yoga-brand calmness must extend to accessibility — never force motion on users who prefer none.
prefers_reduced_motion.implementation: Wrap the page (or layout) in <MotionConfig reducedMotion='user'> so framer-motion treats `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` as instant. Tailwind utilities use motion-reduce: variants already inlined in this spec.

unresolved.reason: Reserve CTA destination — href is '#reserve' but page has no reservation section. Recommend modal flow OR scroll-to a future Reserve section. Best guess: open modal.
'Check availability' has no explicit destination — guessed /centers.
'Overall' tab destination unclear — no matching section. Guessed to scroll to closing-cta. Confirm with design.
No Figma prototype data for instructor cards — guessed /instructors/[slug]. Confirm whether instructor pages exist or if cards should be decorative.
Course-card hrefs guessed as /courses/[slug] from title; no Figma link data.
Only first FAQ answer is filled in Figma — remaining 3 answers are empty placeholders. Content TBD.
